title: New Map Details Leaked
content: Rumors of multiple cities surfacing again, suggesting that Leonida will feature sprawling rural areas, swamps, and neighboring islands alongside Vice City itself.

title: GTA 6 on PS5 Pro
content: What performance can we expect from next-gen hardware? Technical experts speculate that the enhanced GPU of the PS5 Pro will deliver native 4K resolution at a locked 60 FPS.
